candidate_llm_application: SHABONO-RING: K angular-sector context partitioning + per-sector specialised expert FFN + shared central-plaza residual stream

scored_results.title: Blockwise Parallel Transformer for Large Context Models (Liu)
scored_results.note: Blockwise Parallel Transformer chunks the context window into blocks and computes attention+FFN per chunk — directly twins angular-sector partitioning with per-sector expert FFN.

scored_results.title: Block-Sparse FlashAttention
scored_results.note: Block-sparse attention partitions the attention matrix into local blocks — functional equivalent of angular sector partitioning.

scored_results.title: Visual Guide to Attention Variants (Raschka)
scored_results.note: Catalog covers block-sparse + MoE-attention variants spanning the SHABONO-RING design space.

scored_results.title: Sparse Attention Patterns: Local Strided Block-Sparse
scored_results.note: Local+block-sparse patterns are a direct generalisation of K angular sector partitioning.

scored_results.title: Efficient Transformers: A Survey (ACM CSUR)
scored_results.note: Survey enumerates block-sparse + sector + MoE variants covering SHABONO-RING.

scored_results.title: UMoE Unifying Attention FFN Shared Experts
scored_results.note: UMoE shared experts between FFN+attention covers per-sector specialised expert FFN + cross-sector sharing aspect; candidate itself acknowledges UMoE precedent.

scored_results.title: Ring Attention (Aussie AI)
scored_results.note: Ring Attention with blockwise circular topology already partitions long context into ring sectors; candidate self-cites Ring Attention as prior art.

scored_results.title: Rise of Sparse Mixtures of Experts (Switch Transformer)
scored_results.note: Sparse MoE with specialised expert FFNs covers per-sector specialised expert FFN component.

fail_reason: 8 of 8 retrieved results are hits (all sem>=0.7 and func>=0.7; 5 also kw>=2). Block-sparse / blockwise-parallel attention partitions the context into local blocks with per-block compute; Ring Attention adds the circular blockwise topology; UMoE supplies shared per-expert FFN with cross-module sharing; sparse MoE supplies specialised expert FFNs. The recombination claimed by SHABONO-RING (angular context partition + per-sector specialised expert FFN + shared residual stream) is covered by existing literature; candidate itself concedes recombination.
